_title: ISO 19650 — Organization and digitization of information about buildings and civil engineering works, including building information modelling (BIM)

_parts.title: Part 2: Delivery phase of the assets
Part 3: Operational phase of the assets
Part 4: Information exchange
_parts._note: Specifies content and structure of information exchange between organizations

_parts.title: Part 5: Security-minded approach to information management

note: ISO 19650 superseded BS 1192 in the UK in 2018 but the underlying CDE/layer-naming/file-naming concepts remain compatible. UK Annexes (BS EN ISO 19650-1/2 UK Annex) provide national-context guidance.
scope: Information management using BIM across the asset lifecycle. Covers CDE workflows, federated information management, security, and information exchange.

structure_summary.part1: Concepts and principles — terminology, framework, generic process
structure_summary.part2: Delivery phase — appointment process, information requirements, delivery roles
structure_summary.part3: Operational phase — asset information management, AIR/AIM
structure_summary.part4: Information exchange — content and structure of exchanges between organizations
structure_summary.part5: Security-minded approach — sensitivity assessment, security strategy

key_references_in_this_folder.part4-information-exchange.json: ISO 19650-4 — exchange specifications (key concepts only — full exchange specs deferred)
key_references_in_this_folder.terminology.md: Key terms (largely aligned with BS 1192 terminology)
key_references_in_this_folder.cad-layers.json: Skills-layer abstract layout_group → ISO 19650 (generic INT) CAD layer code mapping
